intent: Sweep fixture (MIN) for 1s_2br_wd_side_split_bath_hall_gr -- 11x9 m lot, 35 m2 buildable floor (7x5 envelope, buildable depth 5). Shallow-depth end of the wide single-bath hall program: the ld sibling (1s_2br_wd_side_split_bath_hall_ld) needs buildable depth >= 6 and can't reach this depth, so gr (combined great_room, 2-deep public stack) is the topology to use here. Same lot as its briefs/test/ 11x9 brief.
